marketing_communications_ai.formal_entity: JPTR Enterprises LLC DBA Robinson Creative Group
marketing_communications_ai.description: Marketing, communications, public affairs, AI workflow automation, training, event production, and technical documentation services.

trucking_transportation.description: General freight trucking, local and regional transportation, hauling, delivery support, and logistics-related services.

janitorial_facility_support.description: Janitorial, commercial cleaning, custodial support, sanitation, and facility maintenance support services.

pest_control.description: Pest control, extermination, prevention, inspection, and facility pest management support services.

facility_supplies_distribution.description: Facility supplies, janitorial consumables, hygiene products, paper goods, trash bags, cleaning supplies, office supplies, and general government supply distribution.

past_performance.summary: Multi-market campaign operations at one of the nation’s largest media and live event companies.
Multi-market marketing strategy and promotional execution for a nationally distributed record label.
Executive brand strategy and distribution channel marketing for New York-based fragrance company.
Global speaking events and marketing campaigns across Malaysia, Australia, Singapore, and Asia-Pacific markets.
SAP enterprise technical documentation for Ford Motor Company and major financial institutions.
Telecommunications fraud investigation, analytical review, and regulatory compliance in a large-scale enterprise environment.

strategic_partners.name: HBCU Connect
strategic_partners.summary: Nation’s leading HBCU digital network with 1.5M registered members, 900+ HBCU alumni chapters, and 15 institutional partners.

positioning_notes: Use JPTR Enterprises LLC as the formal legal entity name for government contracting.
Use Robinson Creative Group branding for marketing, communications, AI, creative, training, public affairs, event, and media opportunities.
Use JPTR Enterprises LLC branding for trucking, janitorial, pest control, facility support, logistics, supplies, and general service opportunities.
Do not use the tagline 'Products are Copyable. People Are Not.' for trucking, janitorial, pest control, facility support, logistics, supplies, or other non-marketing capability statements.
For non-marketing opportunities, keep positioning operational, reliable, compliant, and service-focused.
For supply opportunities, emphasize sourcing, fulfillment, responsiveness, facility support, consumables, and government-ready vendor reliability.
For marketing and AI opportunities, emphasize strategy, creativity, campaign execution, public communications, workflow automation, and identity-driven differentiation.
